title: goodenia heterophylla subsp. teucriifolia
intro: Goodenia heterophylla subsp. teucriifolia, also known as Goodenia or Leptomeria, is a native Australian plant species belonging to the Goodeniaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Goodenia heterophylla subsp. teucriifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system function. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
